prompt_text: HR tools with native Slack integration
response:
# HR Tools with Native Slack Integration

## Comprehensive Overview

### **All-in-One HR Platforms**

| Tool | Best For | Slack Features |
|------|----------|----------------|
| **Workday** | Enterprise HR | Limited native integration; uses webhooks |
| **BambooHR** | SMB/Mid-market | Time-off requests, approvals, notifications |
| **Guidepoint** | Company culture | Announcements, surveys, directory lookups |
| **Lattice** | Performance management | 1-on-1 scheduling, feedback, goals |
| **15Five** | Goal tracking | Check-ins, updates, performance reviews |

---

## **Specialized Tools with Strong Slack Integration**

### **Time Off & Scheduling**
- **Roots** - PTO requests, calendar sync, approvals
- **Pto.sh** - Direct Slack-based time-off management
- **When I Work** - Scheduling, shift swaps
- **Humanity** - Workforce scheduling, time tracking

### **Recognition & Engagement**
- **Bonusly** - Peer recognition, rewards
- **Karma** - Instant team recognition
- **Officevibe** - Pulse surveys, engagement tracking
- **Culture Amp** - Employee feedback and surveys

### **Onboarding**
- **BrightHire** - Candidate communication
- **Rippling** - Equipment provisioning notifications
- **Deel** - Contractor & employee onboarding

### **Learning & Development**
- **Docebo** - Course notifications and enrollment
- **Coursera for Business** - Learning reminders
- **Skillsoft** - Training recommendations

### **Expense & Reimbursement**
- **Expensify** - Receipt submission, approval
- **Brex** - Corporate card notifications
- **Divvy** - Spend tracking and approvals

---

## **Native Slack App Features to Look For**

✅ **Core capabilities:**
- Command-based requests (`/pto`, `/request`)
- Real-time approval workflows
- Status updates and notifications
- Employee directory lookup
- Two-way sync (changes reflect in both systems)

✅ **Ideal integrations:**
- No browser tab needed for common tasks
- Threaded conversations for context
- Custom workflows and automations
- Permission-based access controls

---

## **Implementation Tips**

1. **Start with high-frequency tasks** (time-off, approvals)
2. **Test notification volume** (don't spam channels)
3. **Use Slack Connect** for multi-company workflows
4. **Combine tools** - native Slack HR + payroll software (Gusto, ADP)
5. **Set up bot accounts** with appropriate permissions

---

## **Cautions**

⚠️ Some "Slack integration" claims are just **basic webhooks**, not true native apps
⚠️ Data privacy in Slack (SOC 2, encryption at rest)
⚠️ Not all tools auto-sync changes back to HR system
⚠️ Verify compliance needs (HIPAA, GDPR for EU)

---

**What specific HR processes are you looking to streamline?** This would help narrow recommendations further.
